untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern requires multi-bar shape recognition (widening price action, higher highs pattern formation) which cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicators and allowed operators. Pattern detection requires historical shape analysis not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The signal describes a complex geometric pattern (diamond shape with widening price action and higher highs progression) that requires sequential bar-by-bar shape analysis. This level of pattern recognition is beyond the scope of the point-in-time indicator and simple comparison operators provided. Approximation attempted using downtrend (close < sma_20), breakout (higher high), and volume confirmation, but this does not capture the true diamond formation logic described in the source material. The author notes in the source text warn that statistics for this pattern in bear markets are based on small samples, indicating uncertainty in the pattern's reliability.
